positive: A whimsical, highly detailed illustration of a forest sprite sitting on a glowing mushroom. The sprite has iridescent wings and is surrounded by bioluminescent flora and delicate ferns. Studio Ghibli style, vibrant colors, deep shadows, high resolution digital painting, volumetric lighting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, messy lines, amateur sketch
